name: Tango
description: Tango — Automatic step-by-step guide creator that captures browser workflows and generates documentation.

seo.title: Tango — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Tango: Tango — Automatic step-by-step guide creator that captures browser workflows and generates documentation.

when_to_use: Auto-generated step-by-step SOPs from browser recordings
Developer onboarding guide created by capturing a workflow
Product documentation built by showing instead of writing
Customer training material captured from a live product flow
Internal process documentation updated by re-recording steps

pros: Output is embeddable in Notion and Confluence
Free tier covers solo use genuinely
cons: Chrome extension only — no mobile capture
Paid tiers needed for team permissions
Privacy concerns with cloud capture default
review.verdict: The fastest way to turn a workflow into documentation, though Scribe leads the space on polish and sharing.
review.best_for: Ops and support teams producing browser-workflow documentation with minimal effort
review.not_for: Teams needing native desktop app capture or privacy-first self-hosted docs
